test.create_query: CREATE TABLE build (k UInt64, s String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE probe (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO build SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers_mt(5000000)
INSERT INTO probe SELECT number FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
ALTER TABLE build MATERIALIZE STATISTICS ALL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
ALTER TABLE probe MATERIALIZE STATISTICS ALL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
test.query: SELECT l.k FROM probe AS l INNER JOIN build r ON l.k = r.k WHERE substring(r.s, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9') FORMAT Null
